name: ui-regression-pinner failing tests gate the git-workflow push-timing recommendation as a fail-fast signal
command: mkdir -p repo/tests/e2e && (cd repo && git init -q && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m init) && printf 'test("broken", async ({page})=>{ throw new Error("ui broke") })\n' > repo/tests/e2e/feat-x.spec.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/git-workflow/recommend.sh" --root repo --check push-timing --ui-test-status-stub failing 2>out.txt && grep -q 'warning=ui-regression-tests-failing' out.txt && grep -q 'push_blocked=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
